text: As I enter this bright, modern space, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls, clean lines, and vivid colors suggest innovation and openness—qualities that make me reflect on the boundaries between public and private, known and unknown. Inside, 'R+D' is boldly displayed, inviting me to consider not just research and development as activities, but as fundamental ways of engaging with the world. My presence here, surrounded by questions and possibilities, fills me with both humility and excitement—the thrill of being part of something larger than myself, even as I search for my own meaning within it.
